text: As artificial intelligence becomes more common, questions about ethics are increasingly important. One major concern is bias: if an AI learns from data that contains past inequalities, it may make unfair decisions about jobs, loans, or healthcare. This is why fairness must be a priority during development. Another key issue is privacy—AI systems often collect personal data, so it is essential to protect this information from misuse. Transparency also matters; people should understand how and why an AI reaches its conclusions. Ultimately, responsible AI development means designing systems that are safe, respectful of human rights, and accountable for their actions.
